sys_script_client.description: Enable permission fields based on the current user's roles 2.8.1 | 2022-10-24 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office - this script really only changes the Org User to match the Org Member 2.8 | 2022-09-08 - raj - STRY0129039 - OU Hierarchy Group Not Configured for Role Warning 2.8 | 2022-09-08 - raj - STRY0129041 - Block Search for User if Groups are Selected but aren't Configured STRY0050440 - scractch pad value for ouAdmin was not right. Removed it, correctd other fields that were cleared wrong at the top
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Groups and Roles are not fully configured. Navigate to Tasker Administration - Groups Management and select a group for each role. Tasker - The Group is missing the role. Navigate to Tasker Administration - Groups Management and ensure all groups have a role applied. Tasker - This user has been assigned the role explicitly (i.e., not assigned through group membership). Navigate to Tasker Administration - Groups Management and use the "lets fix it" link to move the user into the group. Tasker - This user has been assigned the Task User role explicitly (i.e., not assigned through group membership). Navigate to Tasker Administration - Groups Management and use the "lets fix it" link to move the user into the group.
sys_script_client.name: OU Member - onChange Member User
